## Test plan

<!-- How you verified the change. -->

## Docs impact

- [ ] No user-facing change — docs update not required.
- [ ] User-facing change — the relevant file in `docs/` has been updated in this PR:
  - New/changed feature in `src/routes/**` → `docs/guides/*.md` or `docs/reference/api.md`
  - Schema change in `prisma/schema.prisma` → the guide that owns that entity
  - New/changed environment/system setting → `docs/reference/environment-settings.md` or `docs/reference/system-settings.md`
  - New/changed UI surface in `ui/**` → the corresponding guide under `docs/guides/`
  - New/changed agent or CLI behavior → `docs/reference/agent.md` or `docs/reference/cli.md`

> [!NOTE]
> If a prior feature is partly documented and your PR only extends it, update that section rather than leaving drift behind.
